content.json:
# 🛡️ M365 Activity Explorer
---
Replacement for Sentinel OfficeActivity connector & MDO Threat Explorer. Data via Office 365 Management Activity API.

parameters.label: 🔄 Workload
parameters.name: Workload
parameters.query: OfficeActivity365_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | distinct OfficeWorkload_s | order by OfficeWorkload_s asc

parameters.label: ⚡ Operation
parameters.name: Operation
parameters.query: OfficeActivity365_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where '*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}) | distinct Operation_s | order by Operation_s asc

parameters.label: 🌐 Domain
parameters.name: Domain
parameters.query: OfficeActivity365_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(UserId_s) | extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) | where isnotempty(Domain) | distinct Domain | order by Domain asc

parameters.label: 👤 User
parameters.name: User
parameters.query: OfficeActivity365_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain})) | where isnotempty(UserId_s) | distinct UserId_s | order by UserId_s asc

parameters.label: ✅ Status
parameters.name: Status
parameters.query: OfficeActivity365_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(ResultStatus_s) | distinct ResultStatus_s | order by ResultStatus_s asc

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize 
    TotalEvents = count(),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(UserId_s),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(ClientIP_s),
    FailedLogins = countif(Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed'),
    Workloads = dcount(OfficeWorkload_s),
    Operations = dcount(Operation_s)
content.title: 📊 Overview (Filtered)

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), OfficeWorkload_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 📈 Activity Timeline (by Workload)
⚡ Top Operations
content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize Events = count() by Operation_s
| order by Events desc
| take 20

OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| project TimeGenerated, Workload=OfficeWorkload_s, Operation=Operation_s, User=UserId_s, Domain, IP=ClientIP_s, Status=ResultStatus_s, Object=ObjectId_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 500
content.title: 📋 Event Details (Top 500)

content.json: ## ⚠️ Security Events: Failed Logins, Suspicious IPs, Admin Changes

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed'
| summarize Failures = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 🔐 Failed Login Trend

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed'
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| summarize FailCount = count(), UniqueIPs = dcount(ClientIP_s), LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated), IPs = make_set(ClientIP_s, 5) by UserId_s, Domain
| extend IPs = strcat_array(IPs, ', ')
| order by FailCount desc
| take 25
content.title: 👤 Failed Logins by User

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed'
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| summarize TargetUsers = dcount(UserId_s), Attempts = count(), Users = make_set(UserId_s, 5), Domains = make_set(Domain, 3) by ClientIP_s
| where TargetUsers > 1
| extend Users = strcat_array(Users, ', '), Domains = strcat_array(Domains, ', ')
| order by Attempts desc
| take 20
content.title: 🎯 Suspicious IPs (Multi-User Targeting)

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s in ('Add service principal.', 'Add member to role.', 'Add user.', 'Remove member from role.', 'Update user.', 'Delete user.', 'Add-FederatedDomain', 'New-AcceptedDomain', 'Set-AdminAuditLogConfig', 'New-ManagementRoleAssignment', 'Set domain authentication.', 'Add app role assignment to service principal.', 'Add delegated permission grant.', 'Consent to application.', 'Set-Mailbox', 'New-DlpCompliancePolicy', 'Set-DlpCompliancePolicy')
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| project TimeGenerated, Operation=Operation_s, User=UserId_s, Domain, Workload=OfficeWorkload_s, Object=ObjectId_s, IP=ClientIP_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: 🛠️ Sensitive Admin Operations

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'Exchange'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Operation_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 📬 Exchange Activity Timeline

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'Exchange'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s == 'DlpRuleMatch'
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend PolicyName = tostring(RawJson.PolicyDetails[0].PolicyName),
         RuleName = tostring(RawJson.PolicyDetails[0].Rules[0].RuleName),
         Severity = tostring(RawJson.PolicyDetails[0].Rules[0].RuleSeverity),
         Actions = tostring(RawJson.PolicyDetails[0].Rules[0].Actions)
| project TimeGenerated, PolicyName, RuleName, Severity, User=UserId_s, Actions
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: 🚨 DLP Rule Matches

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'Exchange'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| project TimeGenerated, Operation=Operation_s, User=UserId_s, Domain, IP=ClientIP_s, Object=ObjectId_s, Status=ResultStatus_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 📋 Exchange Event Details

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'AzureActiveDirectory'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Operation_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 🔑 AAD Activity Timeline

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'AzureActiveDirectory'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s in ('UserLoggedIn', 'UserLoginFailed')
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| summarize Success = countif(Operation_s == 'UserLoggedIn'), Failed = countif(Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed') by Domain
| extend FailRate = round(100.0 * Failed / (Success + Failed), 1)
| order by Failed desc
content.title: 🌐 Login Success/Failure by Domain

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'AzureActiveDirectory'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| summarize Events = count(), Ops = dcount(Operation_s), IPs = dcount(ClientIP_s), FailedLogins = countif(Operation_s == 'UserLoginFailed'), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by UserId_s, Domain
| order by Events desc
| take 50
content.title: 👥 User Activity Summary

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s == 'SecurityComplianceCenter'
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Operation_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 🔒 Compliance Activity Timeline

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where OfficeWorkload_s in ('SecurityComplianceCenter', 'Exchange')
| where ('*' in ({Workload}) or OfficeWorkload_s in ({Workload}))
| where ('*' in ({Operation}) or Operation_s in ({Operation}))
| where ('*' in ({Domain}) or tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1]) in ({Domain}))
| where ('*' in ({User}) or UserId_s in ({User}))
| where ('*' in ({Status}) or ResultStatus_s in ({Status}) or (isnull(ResultStatus_s) and '*' in ({Status})))
| where Operation_s in ('DlpRuleMatch', 'Search', 'New-ComplianceSearch', 'Start-ComplianceSearch', 'New-DlpCompliancePolicy', 'Set-DlpCompliancePolicy', 'New-DlpComplianceRule', 'Set-DlpComplianceRule', 'Set-Label')
| extend Domain = tostring(split(UserId_s, '@')[1])
| project TimeGenerated, Operation=Operation_s, User=UserId_s, Domain, Workload=OfficeWorkload_s, Object=ObjectId_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200
content.title: 📋 Compliance & DLP Events

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: 💚 Collection Health (Events/Hour, 7 Days)

content.query:
OfficeActivity365_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| summarize Events = count(), UniqueUsers = dcount(UserId_s), UniqueIPs = dcount(ClientIP_s) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), OfficeWorkload_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: 📊 Daily Ingestion by Workload

content.json:
## 🔍 Sentinel M365 Detection Rules
Adapted from [Microsoft Sentinel M365 Solution](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/Microsoft-365). All 12 analytic rules mapped to `OfficeActivity365_CL` via normalization layer.

> 💡 These rules also deployed as **Query Pack: SecurityMonitoringPack** for use in Log Analytics.

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let queryperiod = 7d;
OfficeActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(queryperiod)
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Parameters has_any ("ForwardTo", "RedirectTo", "ForwardingSmtpAddress")
| mv-apply DynamicParameters = todynamic(Parameters) on (summarize ParsedParameters = make_bag(bag_pack(tostring(DynamicParameters.Name), DynamicParameters.Value)))
| evaluate bag_unpack(ParsedParameters, columnsConflict='replace_source')
| extend DestinationMailAddress = tolower(case(
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("ForwardTo", "")), column_ifexists("ForwardTo", ""),
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("RedirectTo", "")), column_ifexists("RedirectTo", ""),
    isnotempty(column_ifexists("ForwardingSmtpAddress", "")), trim_start(@"smtp:", column_ifexists("ForwardingSmtpAddress", "")),
    ""))
| where isnotempty(DestinationMailAddress)
| summarize Users = make_set(UserId, 50), UserCount = dcount(UserId), EventCount = count() by tostring(DestinationMailAddress), ClientIP
| order by UserCount desc
content.title: ⚠️ [Medium] Multiple users email forwarded to same destination (T1114)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where UserType in (2, 3)
| where Operation =~ "Set-AdminAuditLogConfig"
| extend AdminAuditLogEnabled = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(array_slice(parse_json(Parameters),3,3)))[0])).Value)
| where AdminAuditLogEnabled =~ "False"
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, AdminAuditLogEnabled
content.title: 🚨 [Medium] Exchange AuditLog Disabled (T1562)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let Keywords = dynamic(["helpdesk", " alert", " suspicious", "fake", "malicious", "phishing", "spam", "do not click", "do not open", "hijacked", "Fatal"]);
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "Exchange"
| where Operation =~ "New-InboxRule" and (ResultStatus =~ "True" or ResultStatus =~ "Succeeded")
| where Parameters has "Deleted Items" or Parameters has "Junk Email" or Parameters has "DeleteMessage"
| extend Events=todynamic(Parameters)
| parse Events with * "SubjectContainsWords" SubjectContainsWords '}'*
| parse Events with * "BodyContainsWords" BodyContainsWords '}'*
| parse Events with * "SubjectOrBodyContainsWords" SubjectOrBodyContainsWords '}'*
| where SubjectContainsWords has_any (Keywords) or BodyContainsWords has_any (Keywords) or SubjectOrBodyContainsWords has_any (Keywords)
| extend Keyword = iff(isnotempty(SubjectContainsWords), SubjectContainsWords, (iff(isnotempty(BodyContainsWords),BodyContainsWords,SubjectOrBodyContainsWords)))
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, Keyword, OfficeObjectId
content.title: 🚨 [Medium] Malicious Inbox Rule (T1098)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
| where Operation in~ ("New-TransportRule", "Set-TransportRule")
| mv-apply DynamicParameters = todynamic(Parameters) on (summarize ParsedParameters = make_bag(pack(tostring(DynamicParameters.Name), DynamicParameters.Value)))
| mv-expand ExpandedParameters = todynamic(Parameters)
| where ExpandedParameters.Name in~ ("BlindCopyTo", "RedirectMessageTo") and isnotempty(ExpandedParameters.Value)
| extend RedirectTo = tostring(ExpandedParameters.Value)
| extend RuleName = case(Operation =~ "Set-TransportRule", OfficeObjectId, Operation =~ "New-TransportRule", tostring(ParsedParameters.Name), "Unknown")
| project TimeGenerated, RedirectTo, UserId, Operation, RuleName, ClientIP
content.title: ⚠️ [Medium] Mail redirect via ExO transport rule (T1114)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where Operation in~ ("Add-MailboxPermission", "Add-MailboxFolderPermission", "Set-Mailbox", "New-ManagementRoleAssignment", "New-InboxRule", "Set-InboxRule", "Set-TransportRule")
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, OfficeWorkload, ResultStatus, OfficeObjectId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: ⚡ [Low] Rare and high-risk Office operations (T1098)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where Operation has_any ("Remove", "Disable")
| where Operation contains "AntiPhish" or Operation contains "SafeAttachment" or Operation contains "SafeLinks" or Operation contains "Dlp" or Operation contains "Audit"
| where UserType in (2, 3)
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, ResultStatus, Parameters
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: 🚨 [Medium] Office Policy Tampering (T1562)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload == "Exchange"
| where Operation == "MailboxLogin" and Logon_Type != "Owner"
| summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), count() by Operation, UserId, MailboxOwnerUPN, Logon_Type, ClientIP
content.title: ⚡ [Low] Non-owner mailbox login activity (T1114)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let max_delete_count = 3;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"
| where Operation =~ "TeamDeleted"
| summarize StartTime = min(TimeGenerated), EndTime = max(TimeGenerated), DeletedTeams = make_set(TeamName, 1000) by UserId
| where array_length(DeletedTeams) > max_delete_count
content.title: ⚡ [Low] Multiple Teams deleted by a single user (T1485)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
OfficeActivity
| where OfficeWorkload =~ "MicrosoftTeams"
| where Operation in~ ("MemberAdded", "MemberRemoved")
| where Members has "#EXT#"
| extend ParsedMembers = todynamic(Members)
| mv-expand ParsedMembers
| extend UPN = tostring(ParsedMembers.UPN)
| where UPN has "#EXT#"
| project TimeGenerated, Operation, ExternalUser=UPN, ActionBy=UserId, TeamName, ClientIP
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: ⚡ [Low] External user added/removed in Teams (T1136)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let threshold = 50;
OfficeActivity
| where EventSource == "SharePoint" and OfficeWorkload has_any("SharePoint", "OneDrive") and Operation has_any ("FileDownloaded", "FileSyncDownloadedFull", "FileSyncUploadedFull", "FileUploaded")
| summarize FileCount=dcount(OfficeObjectId), FileList=make_set(OfficeObjectId, 20) by UserId, ClientIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where FileCount >= threshold
| order by FileCount desc
content.title: ⚠️ [Medium] SharePoint File transfer above threshold (T1020)

content.query:
let OfficeActivity = OfficeActivity365_CL
| extend RawJson = parse_json(RawEventData_s)
| extend 
    OfficeWorkload = OfficeWorkload_s,
    Operation = Operation_s,
    UserId = coalesce(UserId_s, tostring(UserId_g)),
    ClientIP = ClientIP_s,
    ResultStatus = ResultStatus_s,
    RecordType = tostring(RecordType_d),
    OfficeObjectId = coalesce(ObjectId_s, tostring(ObjectId_g)),
    UserType = toint(RawJson.UserType),
    Parameters = tostring(RawJson.Parameters),
    MailboxOwnerUPN = tostring(RawJson.MailboxOwnerUPN),
    Client_IPAddress = tostring(RawJson.ClientIPAddress),
    ClientInfoString = tostring(RawJson.ClientInfoString),
    Logon_Type = tostring(RawJson.LogonType),
    OriginatingServer = tostring(RawJson.OriginatingServer),
    SourceFileName = coalesce(SourceFileName_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileName)),
    SourceFileExtension = coalesce(SourceFileExtension_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceFileExtension)),
    SourceRelativeUrl = coalesce(SourceRelativeUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SourceRelativeUrl)),
    SiteUrl = coalesce(SiteUrl_s, tostring(RawJson.SiteUrl)),
    EventSource = coalesce(EventSource_s, tostring(RawJson.EventSource)),
    TeamName = tostring(RawJson.TeamName),
    Members = tostring(RawJson.Members),
    UserAgent = tostring(RawJson.UserAgent)
| project-away RawJson;
let execExt = dynamic(['exe', 'inf', 'gzip', 'cmd', 'bat']);
OfficeActivity
| where Operation =~ "FileUploaded"
| where SourceFileExtension has_any (execExt)
| project TimeGenerated, OfficeWorkload, Operation, UserId, ClientIP, UserAgent, SiteUrl, SourceRelativeUrl, SourceFileName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ⚡ [Low] New executable via Office FileUploaded (T1105)

content.json:
## 📊 Sentinel M365 Detection Rules Summary

| # | Rule Name | Severity | MITRE | Category |
|---|-----------|----------|-------|----------|
| 1 | Multiple users email forwarded to same destination | 🟠 Medium | T1114, T1020 | Exchange |
| 2 | Exchange AuditLog Disabled | 🟠 Medium | T1562 | Exchange |
| 3 | Malicious Inbox Rule | 🟠 Medium | T1098, T1078 | Exchange |
| 4 | Mail redirect via ExO transport rule | 🟠 Medium | T1114, T1020 | Exchange |
| 5 | Rare and high-risk Office operations | 🟡 Low | T1098, T1114 | Exchange |
| 6 | Office Policy Tampering | 🟠 Medium | T1098, T1562 | Exchange |
| 7 | Non-owner mailbox login activity | 🟡 Low | T1114, T1020 | Exchange |
| 8 | Multiple Teams deleted by a single user | 🟡 Low | T1485, T1489 | Teams |
| 9 | External user added/removed in short timeframe | 🟡 Low | T1136 | Teams |
| 10 | SharePoint File transfer above threshold | 🟠 Medium | T1020 | SharePoint |
| 11 | New executable via Office FileUploaded | 🟡 Low | T1105, T1570 | SharePoint |
| 12 | Exchange MailItemsAccessed anomaly | 🟠 Medium | T1114 | Exchange |

> **Source**: Adapted from [Azure-Sentinel/solutions/Microsoft-365](https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/tree/master/Solutions/Microsoft-365)
> **Table**: `OfficeActivity365_CL` with `OfficeActivityNormalized` function
> **Query Pack**: `SecurityMonitoringPack` in Log Analytics
